name: Super Crow!
desc: Your crow has its abilities upgraded.

name: SuperCrow!2
desc: Your crow has its abilities upgraded… Twice!

name: Nature's Guidance
desc: Allied familiars are immune to damage from tiles, knockback, thorns, and trample.

name: NaturesGuidance2
desc:
Allied familiars are immune to damage from tiles, knockback, thorns, and trample.
Familiars you spawn gain +1 Holy Shield.

name: Poison Ivy
desc: You and familiar you spawn are Poisonous.

name: PoisonIvy2
desc: You and familiar you spawn have Poisonous 2.

name: Pathfinder
desc: Grass tiles are free to move through for you and familiars you spawn. Plant grass as you walk.

name: Pathfinder2
desc: Grass tiles are free to move through for you and familiars you spawn. Gain +1 HP when moving through grass tiles. Plant grass as you walk.

name: Empty Vessels
desc: Familiars you spawn have +3 Health Regeneration and +10 max health.

name: EmptyVessels2
desc: Familiars you spawn have +3 Health Regeneration and uncapped HP.

name: Wild Animals
desc: Familiars you spawn attack a random enemy within their range when they are spawned.

name: WildAnimals2
desc: Familiars you spawn attack a random enemy within their range when they're spawned, then they take an extra turn.

name: Bark Skin
desc:
+1 Brace.
When you take damage, you get +1 temporary Brace until the start of your next turn.

name: BarkSkin2
desc:
+1 Brace.
When you take damage, gain +2 temporary Brace and +2 temporary Thorns until the start of your next turn.

name: Love Song
desc: Your basic action has +2 area, and heals 1 additional HP.

name: LoveSong2
desc: Your basic action has +2 area, and heals 2 additional HP. The Damage your basic action grants lasts until the end of the battle.

name: Teamwork
desc: When one of your familiars kills something, all allies get +1 Damage.

name: Teamwork2
desc: When one of your familiars kills something, all allies get +1 Damage and heal 5 health.

name: Bouquet
desc: Spawn a tall flower tile under you at the end of your turn.

name: Bouquet2
desc: Spawn tall flower tiles under and around you at the end of your turn.

name: Good Vibrations
desc: Allies have +1 Health Regeneration and +1 Mana Regeneration.

name: GoodVibrations2
desc: Allies have +2 Health Regeneration and +2 Mana Regeneration.

name: Versatile Vocalist
desc: Your basic action deals 1 damage to enemies, and inflicts temporary -1 Damage. Your basic attack wont apply debuffs to allies or buffs to enemies.

name: VersatileVocalist2
desc: Your basic action has +1 area, deals 1 damage to enemies, and inflicts temporary -1 Damage. Your basic attack wont apply debuffs to allies or buffs to enemies.

name: Like a Fish
desc:
Water tiles don't slow you down.
Gain +1 Holy Shield at the end of the turn if you're wet and have no Holy Shield.
Familiars you spawn also have this passive.

name: LikeaFish2
desc:
Water tiles don't slow you down.
Gain +1 Holy Shield at the end of the turn if you're wet and have no Holy Shield.  Gain +1 Health Regeneration.
Familiars you spawn also have this passive.

name: Encore
desc: When you use a musical ability, refresh your basic action.

name: Encore2
desc: Your musical spells cost 1 less mana. When you use a musical ability, refresh your basic action.

name: Super Friends
desc: Familiars spawned by spells gain All Stats Up 2, but that spell gets disabled until the spawned familiars die.

name: SuperFriends2
desc:
Familiars spawned by spells gain All Stats Up 2, but that spell gets disabled until the spawned familiars die.
Your spawning spells cost 50% less mana.

name: Sneak Attack
desc:
Your spells that spawn familiars cost -3 mana.
Familiars spawned by your spells gain +2 Damage and +2 Movement, but die after their first turn.

name: SneakAttack2
desc:
Your spells that spawn familiars cost -3 mana.
Familiars spawned by your spells gain +4 Damage and +4 Movement, but die after their first turn.

name: Wild Style
desc: The first time you shapeshift each turn, gain an extra turn.

name: WildStyle2
desc: The first time you shapeshift each turn, gain All Stats Up and an extra turn.

name: Buddy System
desc: When you lose [img:divineshield], your crow gains +1 [img:divineshield]. When your crow loses [img:divineshield], gain +1 [img:divineshield].

name: BuddySystem2
desc: When you lose [img:divineshield], all your familiars gain +1 [img:divineshield]. When your crow loses [img:divineshield], gain +1 [img:divineshield].

name: Flower Power
desc: Units on flower tiles have +2 [img:str] and +2 Brace. When you move, plant flowers on the tile you moved from.

name: FlowerPower2
desc: Units on flower tiles have +2 [img:str] and +2 Brace. When you move, plant flowers on all tiles you move through.

name: Suicide Squad
desc: Your controllable familiars gain Self Destruct as their bonus ability.

name: SuicideSquad2
desc: Your controllable familiars gain Self Destruct+ as their bonus ability.

name: Feral
desc: Your bonus ability is Feral Attack.

name: Feral2
desc: Your bonus ability is Feral Attack.

name: Rap God
desc: Your basic action also gives temporary +4 [img:spd].

name: RapGod2
desc: Your basic action also gives temporary +4 [img:spd], enemies gain Confusion 2 instead.

name: Animalistic
desc:
Familiars you spawn gain +2 Damage.
When you shapeshift, gain +1 Damage.

name: Animalistic2
desc:
Familiars you spawn gain +2 Damage and a Bonus Attack.
When you shapeshift, gain +1 Damage and refresh your basic attack.

name: Maestro
desc: Your musical spells cost 50% less mana.

name: Maestro2
desc:
Your musical spells cost 50% less mana.
When you use a musical spell, heal 1 HP and gain +1 to a random stat.

name: Mega Minions
desc: Every 3rd familiar you spawn is upgraded into a Champion.

name: MegaMinions2
desc:
The 1st and every 3rd familiar you spawn are upgraded into a Champion.
[s:.7](The first familiar you spawn is likely your Crow.)[/s]
